acceptance_criteria.text: Frontend keyword matching for service suggestions distinguishes exact, normalized, and close beauty matches.
Existing UI helper getMatchedKeywords no longer returns empty for obvious Russian wordforms and close beauty synonyms.
proof: Targeted frontend regression covers брови/бровей, ресницы/ресниц, ваксинг/восковая депиляция, and афро.

acceptance_criteria.text: Beauty guardrails reject unconfirmed medical claims and added treatment zones in generated names/descriptions.
proof: tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py covers the Плазмотерапия - 2 пробирки live-log failure pattern.

acceptance_criteria.text: Implementation stays scoped to beauty service optimization and /dashboard/card service helpers, without schema changes; any production cleanup is targeted and backed up.
proof: Backed up and cleared 4 bad generated service suggestions in optimized_name/optimized_description only.

acceptance_criteria.text: Regression checks cover beauty keyword matching and live-log guardrail failure pattern.
proof: Backend tests, Python compile check, and targeted frontend keyword script passed.

known_gaps: Full frontend TypeScript check fails on pre-existing unrelated errors outside the changed service keyword helper.
